title: TaskList
description: Phase 3 artifact: Atomic task list. Each task must be independently committable (ADR-008). Current format: Markdown checkbox list (validated structurally). Gap 3 transitions this to JSON.

tasks.description: Ordered list of atomic implementation tasks. Each task produces one commit.

id.description: Unique task identifier within the feature (e.g. task-001)

description.description: What this task does; should be implementable in one agent session

files.description: Files this specific task will modify (subset of techspec.files_likely_touched)

acceptance_criteria.description: Verifiable conditions that determine this task is complete
